Medial Distal Humerus Plate

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Medial distal humerus plates designed for medial column fixation in distal humeral fractures. Features dual hole diameter compatibility for versatile screw options.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Medial Distal Humerus Plate, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Medial Distal Humerus Plate is constructed using Titanium (Pure/CP), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
